checks.desc: No order still has status 'pending' — the bulk status change touched every order (GAP's hardest case: many ops or fail).
Exactly 39 occurrences of 'shipped' — one per remaining order. Catches a flow that updates some orders but silently drops the rest.
Total seed rows remain exactly 120 — a bulk field update must not add or drop rows.
orders table still has exactly 39 rows after the bulk status update.
